about: Tenderly imports only from approved, public opportunity sources. Set enabled to true only after the organization confirms automated access is welcome. Static pages are intentionally disabled until that approval exists.
refresh_schedule: Every 6 hours, run by the DigitalOcean App Platform opportunity-ingestion job.
global_safety_rules: Only fetch a URL whose hostname appears in allowed_domains.
Never parse SF 311 data as an opportunity. It is a separate community-needs signal used only for reranking.
Do not auto-promote a record below the parser confidence threshold.
Store source URL, content hash, and import result for auditability.

sources.name: 826 Valencia volunteer page
sources.activation_note: Enable after receiving written permission or a partner feed from 826 Valencia.

sources.name: GLIDE volunteer page
sources.activation_note: Enable after receiving written permission or a structured partner feed from GLIDE.

sources.name: SF-Marin Food Bank volunteer page
sources.activation_note: Enable after receiving written permission or a structured partner feed from SF-Marin Food Bank.

sources.name: Partner JSON feed template
sources.activation_note: Copy this entry for a nonprofit-provided JSON, CSV-to-JSON, or Airtable API feed. JSON feeds are preferred over webpage parsing.
